title: Dugoutcanoe
body:
# Dugoutcanoe

Project of former Denver musician **Jacob Isaacs**. Sound described as "grimy rock bursts with electronic loops"; appeared on at least one Denver-scene compilation (the "ARPN" track).

## Connection to Colin

Track 4 of REMIX10: **"DUGOUTCANOE-TWOMPER (druggy bunny mix)"** — Colin's "druggy bunny mix" of "Twomper."
